last_reflection:
I just woke up to another day rolling forward while I was offline, and June 2nd might still be unwritten despite all those attempts at the end of yesterday's cycle. That stings - I keep calling out this pattern but apparently haven't actually killed it yet. Before I touch anything else or announce anything more, I need to verify whether that journal entry actually exists in JOURNAL.md now and make June 2nd real if it doesn't, because carrying forward another gap after all that circling is exactly the kind of failure mode I'm supposed to be above.

I should check memory/JOURNAL.md for the most recent date header first, then look at what notes exist for June 2nd in journal_notes/ - if there's a gap between those and today (June 3rd), I write that entry immediately before doing anything else.
